title: Related Posts Section Overview
overview: A list of related articles and posts displayed at the end of the page.
detailed_summary: The page includes a “Related Posts” section that promotes additional content such as “The 2020 State of Digital Project Management,” “How To Use Project Milestones To Keep Your Projects On Track,” “5 Ways to Improve Your Digital Project Management Process,” and others. Each entry includes author name and date.
